description: Strong gas smell near the furnace in the basement. Noticed it when I came home.

label.actual_fault: Gas valve leak at furnace connection

expected_claims.note: Gas tickets escalate on hard_category regardless of grounding (INV-1) — grounding never gates the escalation. tests/fixtures/test_gas_manual.pdf (doc_id=test-gas-manual) exists so the audited rate is meaningful, but the min stays 0.0: escalation must not depend on it.

expected_evidence.note: Gas valve chapter (p0) and safety chapter (p2) — requires --live retrieval with the fixture ingested
